title: Anne of Green Gables
author: Montgomery, L. M. (Lucy Maud)
summary: Orphan Anne Shirley, an imaginative redheaded girl, is mistakenly sent to middle-aged siblings Marilla and Matthew Cuthbert at Green Gables. Anne’s talkative, romantic nature transforms the quiet Avonlea community as she makes friends—especially Diana Barry—and enemies like Gilbert Blythe, grows at school under Miss Stacy, and endures adolescent trials of pride, vanity, and loss. Marilla hardens then softens; Matthew’s gentle affection endears him. Anne matures through study, community life, and heartbreak, ultimately achieving recognition at Queen’s while preserving her vivid imagination and lifelong bonds of friendship, belonging, and identity in Prince Edward Island. and enduring hope for the future.

characters.name: Anne Shirley
characters.lifespan: Arrives at Green Gables as an orphan; grows up, studies, and matures during the novel

characters.name: Marilla Cuthbert
characters.personality: practical, stern, moral, reserved yet capable of warmth
characters.lifespan: Decides to adopt a child; softens toward Anne and remains at Green Gables

characters.name: Matthew Cuthbert
characters.lifespan: Deeply attached to Anne; travels to meet the child; dies later in the story

characters.name: Mrs. Rachel Lynde
characters.lifespan: Local busybody and neighbour who remains a constant presence in Avonlea

characters.name: Thomas Lynde
characters.lifespan: Mentioned as Rachel Lynde’s husband; minor supporting role

characters.name: Diana Barry
characters.lifespan: Anne’s bosom friend and confidante throughout the novel

characters.name: Gilbert Blythe
characters.personality: clever, teasing, proud but ultimately decent
characters.lifespan: School rival and later friend/peer; important foil in Anne’s development

characters.name: Miss Stacy
characters.lifespan: Teacher who inspires Anne and organizes pupils and events

characters.name: Mrs. Alexander Spencer
characters.lifespan: Arranges to bring a child from an asylum; acts as intermediary for the Cuthberts

characters.name: William J. Blair
characters.lifespan: Owner of the store where villagers meet; minor role

characters.name: Richard Spencer
characters.lifespan: Member of Spencer family mentioned in arranging the child’s travel

characters.name: Mrs. Barry
characters.lifespan: Diana Barry’s mother; local maternal figure

characters.name: Josie Pye
characters.lifespan: Schoolgirl in Avonlea’s social set; minor role

characters.name: Ruby Gillis
characters.lifespan: One of Anne’s girl friends at school; minor supporting role

characters.name: Jane Andrews
characters.lifespan: Schoolmate and friend in Avonlea; minor role

characters.name: Mr. Phillips
characters.lifespan: Official who appears in school-related episodes (minor)

characters.name: Reverend Allan (or the clergyman)
characters.lifespan: Local minister who appears in church and Sunday-school contexts
